Class Enemy

java.lang.Object
enemy.Enemy
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bomber, Boss, FlyingEnemy, Orc, Skeleton
public class Enemy extends Object
The Enemy class serves as the base entity for all hostile units in the game. It manages essential unit properties including navigation along a path, health management, and debuff logic. This class provides the foundation for movement calculations using vector mathematics to ensure smooth transitions between waypoints.

  • Field Details

    • imagePath

      protected String imagePath

  • Constructor Details

    • Enemy

      public Enemy(EnemyPath enemyPath, int hp, int damage, double speed)
      Constructs a new Enemy with a specific path and base statistics. The enemy is automatically positioned at the start of the provided path.
      Parameters:
      enemyPath - The predefined path waypoints for navigation
      hp - Initial health points
      damage - Damage dealt to the player upon reaching the end
      speed - Base movement velocity

  • Method Details

    • getImagePath

      public String getImagePath()
      Returns:
      The resource path for the enemy's visual sprite.

    • update

      public void update(double deltaTime)
      Updates the enemy's state for each frame. This includes handling the slowing effect duration, calculating the movement vector toward the next waypoint, and updating the position.
      Parameters:
      deltaTime - Time elapsed since the last update frame

    • takeDamage

      public void takeDamage(int damage)
      Reduces health points and triggers death logic if health reaches zero.
      Parameters:
      damage - Amount of damage to subtract from current health

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Returns:
      true if the enemy is still active in the game.

    • die

      public void die()
      Sets the enemy state to inactive and stops all updates.

    • isFinished

      public boolean isFinished()
      Returns:
      true if the enemy has navigated through all path waypoints.

    • onReachEnd

      public void onReachEnd()
      Logic executed when the enemy successfully completes its path.

    • hasReachedEnd

      public boolean hasReachedEnd()
      Returns:
      true if the enemy has reached the end of the path, false otherwise.

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      Returns:
      Current waypoint index in the navigation sequence.

    • getHp

      public int getHp()
      Returns:
      Current health points.

    • setHp

      public void setHp(int hp)
      Parameters:
      hp - Sets health points, with a minimum of zero.

    • getDamage

      public int getDamage()
      Returns:
      The damage value of this enemy unit.

    • setDamage

      public void setDamage(int damage)
      Parameters:
      damage - Sets the damage value and ensure the damage does not fall below zero.

    • getPosition

      public javafx.geometry.Point2D getPosition()
      Returns:
      Current 2D position coordinates.

    • getEnemyPath

      public EnemyPath getEnemyPath()
      Returns:
      The EnemyPath object containing the waypoint data.

    • applySlow

      public void applySlow(double percent, double duration)
      Applies a movement slowing effect for a specific duration. If multiple slows are applied, the strongest effect takes priority.
      Parameters:
      percent - Speed reduction percentage (0.0 to 1.0)
      duration - Duration of the effect in seconds

    • setBaseSpeed

      public void setBaseSpeed(double baseSpeed)
      Parameters:
      baseSpeed - the base movement speed of this enemy.

    • getBaseSpeed

      public double getBaseSpeed()
      Returns:
      The base movement speed of this enemy.

    • setCurrentSpeed

      public void setCurrentSpeed(double currentSpeed)
      Parameters:
      currentSpeed - Sets the actual movement speed used for current frame calculations.

    • isSlowed

      public boolean isSlowed()
      Returns:
      true if the enemy is slowed, false otherwise.

    • getMaxHp

      public int getMaxHp()
      Returns:
      The maximum health points (HP).

    • hasArmor

      public boolean hasArmor()
      Returns:
      true if the enemy is armored, false by default.

    • getArmor

      public int getArmor()
      Returns:
      The integer value of this enemy's armor.

    • getX

      public double getX()
      Returns:
      The current X-coordinate.

    • getY

      public double getY()
      Returns:
      The current Y-coordinate.

    • setPosition

      public void setPosition(javafx.geometry.Point2D point2D)
      Parameters:
      point2D - sets the enemy's position on the game map.

    • setIndex

      public void setIndex(int i)
      Parameters:
      i - Sets the waypoint index of this enemy.
